prompt:
A 250 mL amber glass bottle of 3% hydrogen peroxide on a clean hydroponics workstation, with a child-resistant cap and a small measuring cup beside it. In the background are rinsed tubing segments and a compact sprayer, suggesting sanitation of hydro gear; the bottle label is generic and non-readable, relying on the distinctive amber bottle and safety cap to convey the item.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a near-future clean-lab hydroponics aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic glass reflections, no brand marks, and no readable text. Keep the bottle centered and isolated enough to work as a clear inventory icon.
